data.title: Partners establish CO₂ logistics hub at Stockholm Norvik Port to transport carbon dioxide from industrial emitters in eastern Sweden.
data.description: In Oslo, Norway on December 4, 2025, it was announced that Höegh Evi and Aker BP, in partnership with Ports of Stockholm, have joined forces to create a CO₂ logistics hub. This initiative aims to establish a streamlined and eco-friendly transport system for carbon dioxide originating from industrial sources in eastern Sweden. Through this collaboration, the organizations seek to enhance efficiency and sustainability in handling CO₂ emissions, paving the way for a more environmentally conscious approach to industrial transportation.

data.title: CIBC reports $7.58 billion in revenue and $2.18 billion in net income for Q4/25, up 14% and 16% YoY respectively. Full story on Benzinga.com.
data.description: CIBC's 2025 annual consolidated financial statements and MD&A are now available online, showcasing record financial performance. The fourth quarter highlights include revenue of $7.576 billion, reported net income of $2.180 billion, adjusted net income of $2.188 billion, and adjusted pre-provision, pre-tax earnings of $3.408 billion. For the full year, CIBC reported net income of $8.5 billion and adjusted net income of $8.5 billion, compared to $7.2 billion and $7.3 billion in 2024, respectively. The bank also announced an increase in its quarterly common share dividend from $0.97 to $1.07. The balance sheet shows total assets of $1.117 trillion. Furthermore, CIBC has made significant community contributions, such as donating $100,000 for hurricane relief and participating in charitable events like the Canadian Cancer Society Run for the Cure. An in-depth breakdown of performance numbers across different business segments and key financial metrics is presented.

data.title: WhiteBIT's native coin WBT added to S&P Cryptocurrency Broad Digital Market Index, enhancing visibility in Europe.
data.description: In Vilnius, Lithuania, on December 4, 2025, the WhiteBIT coin was added to the S&P Cryptocurrency Broad Digital Market (BDM) Index. This inclusion is a key achievement for WhiteBIT and the fintech sector in Central and Eastern Europe. The S&P BDM Index now incorporates WhiteBIT coin, underscoring its importance in the market. This milestone signifies a notable development in the cryptocurrency space, with WhiteBIT making strides by being part of an index that tracks digital assets.

data.title: Bitcoin ATM operator in Seattle told to return over $8M to customers in WA crackdown for claiming unredeemed vouchers as income.
data.description: A Bitcoin ATM operator headquartered in Seattle is at risk of having its license revoked for reportedly treating unredeemed customer vouchers as income.

data.title: New Grayscale Chainlink ETF accrues $41M on launch but falls short of expectations, unable to offset LINK token's 39% drop.
data.description: The launch of the Chainlink ETF was described as successful by analysts, but it has not generated sufficient liquidity to offset the LINK token's 39% decrease in the last year.

data.title: UPM & Sappi sign non-binding intent to form graphic paper JV. Dec 4, 2025. Helsinki. (100 chars)
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Helsinki, UPM-Kymmene Corporation announced the signing of a non-binding letter of intent with Sappi Limited to establish a graphic paper joint venture. This partnership aims to strengthen their presence in the market and enhance their competitiveness. The agreement is a significant move towards collaboration and strategic growth for both companies. The specific details and financial implications of the joint venture were not disclosed in the release.

data.title: Projected AAVE breakout to $195-$205 in 7 days due to bullish MACD and RSI recovery.
data.description: Experts are forecasting that AAVE's price will experience a significant increase in the near future, potentially reaching between $195 and $205 within the next week. This prediction is backed by a bullish MACD momentum and a rebound in the Relative Strength Index (RSI) from previously oversold levels.

data.title: Shentel launches fiber-to-the-home internet in Radford, VA, offering symmetrical, multi-gig speeds starting Dec 2025.
data.description: Edinburg, VA, December 4, 2025 - Shenandoah Telecommunications Company (Shentel) (Nasdaq: SHEN), a top broadband services provider, has revealed the introduction of its new 100% fiber-to-the-home internet service in Radford, Virginia. The Shentel Fiber service offers symmetrical, multi-gig internet speeds to residential and commercial customers beginning in December 2025. The construction for this service is set to be finished by March 2026.

data.title: China commissions 300MW/1200MWh energy storage station powered by 1725kW PCS from SINEXCEL.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on December 4, 2025, the initial phase of China's biggest electrochemical energy storage station was launched, boasting a capacity of 300 MW and 1200 MWh. Operating with SINEXCEL's 1725 kW utility-scale Power Conversion System (PCS), this achievement signifies a significant advancement in renewable energy infrastructure.

data.title: Little-known company Liquidity Services Inc. (NASDAQ: LQDT) gaining momentum as eBay competitor, according to Benzinga's Edge Rankings.
data.description: An emerging e-commerce firm, resembling eBay Inc. (NASDAQ: EBAY), named Liquidity Services Inc. (NASDAQ: LQDT), is gaining significant traction in Benzinga's Edge Stock Rankings. This company provides surplus asset management services to the e-commerce and retail sector through various online marketplaces it operates. Competing with eBay, Liquidity Services Inc. is experiencing a surge in its Momentum score in Benzinga's Edge Rankings. The detailed article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Siren receives funding from Elastic to enhance AI-driven investigations for national security, with K9 AI Companion.
data.description: In GALWAY, Ireland, Siren, an all-in-one investigation company, revealed a significant investment from Elastic (NYSE: ESTC), known for Elasticsearch. This investment bolsters their longstanding partnership and speeds up the advancement of Siren’s AI-powered platform. The recent launch of K9 AI Companion by Siren, now utilized by national security, law enforcement, and financial crime agencies globally, is a key focus. This collaboration leverages the Elasticsearch Platform, showcasing shared dedication to innovation in the industry.

data.title: LDO projected to reach $0.95 by end of year, and rally to $2.30 by 2025, as per analyst predictions.
data.description: Analysts are predicting a bullish trend for LDO with technical indicators signaling a potential increase towards $0.95 in the short term and $2.30 in the long term.

data.title: Expected HBAR price surge to $0.18-$0.20 in 30 days, despite current weakness. Up to 43% increase projected.
data.description: According to a recent price prediction, HBAR is expected to potentially increase by 28-43% to reach a range of $0.18-$0.20 within the next month. This positive outlook comes despite existing bearish pressure below crucial moving averages.

data.title: Nutex Health extends share repurchase plan, operates 25 micro hospitals in 11 states. NASDAQ: NUTX. Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Houston, Nutex Health Inc. (NASDAQ: NUTX), a leader in integrated healthcare, announced its network of 25 advanced micro hospitals and hospital outpatient departments across 11 states. The company, led by physicians, focuses on primary care-centric services to deliver comprehensive healthcare solutions.

data.title: Agile Consulting Group partners with LeadingAge Washington to provide sales tax services to 50,000+ older adults.
data.description: Agile Consulting Group, experts in sales tax exemption and compliance, have recently partnered with LeadingAge Washington to further their mission of enhancing the aging experience for more than 50,000 seniors. The collaboration was officially announced on December 4, 2025, in Atlanta. This partnership aims to provide specialized support and guidance to LeadingAge Washington, leveraging Agile Consulting Group's expertise in navigating sales tax regulations and ensuring compliance. This collaboration signifies a significant step towards improving services and resources for the elderly population in Washington.
